output.final_deliverable: I cannot find an explicit statement naming the capital city of Australia in the provided merged results. The merged results list authoritative pages that likely contain the answer (for example: https://www.britannica.com/place/Australia and https://www.cia.gov/the-world-factbook/countries/australia/), but the page content returned in the merged results did not include the exact sentence or data field that names the capital. Please allow me to fetch the content from one of those URLs so I can extract and cite the exact authoritative statement (e.g., the sentence that names the capital).
output.action_summary: What’s missing: an explicit excerpt or data field from an authoritative source in the provided merged results that directly states the capital city of Australia. Present in the merged results: two authoritative URLs (Britannica and the CIA World Factbook) are listed but their page contents in the merged results do not include the capital name. Next step: visit one of those URLs to extract the exact sentence naming the capital and provide the citation.
